problem.title: Sliding Window Maximum
problem.description: You are given an array of integers nums, there is a sliding window of size k which is moving from the very left of the array to the very right.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Deque
solutions.description: Use a monotonic deque that stores indices in decreasing order of their corresponding values. Before adding each new element, evict indices outside the current window from the front and remove smaller elements from the back (they can never be the maximum while the new element is in the window). The front of the deque always holds the index of the current window's maximum.
